ingredients_text:
VEGETABLE OIL BLEND (PALM OIL, CANOLA OIL), WATER, 
OLIVE OIL, SALT, PEA, PROTEIN ISOLATE, NATURAL AND ARTIFICIAL FLAVORS, SUNFLOWER LECITHIN, VITAMIN A PALMITATE, BETA, CAROTENE (COLOR), VITAMIN D3 (CHOLECALCIFEROL), MONOGLYCERIDES, FLAXSEED OIL, WITH POTASSIUM, SORBATE, LACTIC ACID AND CALCIUM DISODIUM, EDTA
